nodes.name: Dryoscopus
nodes.summary: Dryoscopus（Dryoscopus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联6种鸟类，如Northern puffback、Pringle's puffback、Black-backed puffback等6种鸟类。

nodes.name: 中部非洲
nodes.summary: 中部非洲是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联21种鸟类，包括Black guinea fowl、Plumed guinea fowl、绿冠蕉鹃等21种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Red-eyed puffback
nodes.summary: Red-eyed puffback（Dryoscopus senegalensis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Red-eyed puffback。

nodes.name: 奈及利亞
nodes.summary: 奈及利亞是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联144种鸟类，包括非洲黑鴨、Black guinea fowl、White-throated francolin等144种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 鸟纲

nodes.name: Red-eyed puffback
nodes.summary: The red-eyed puffback (Dryoscopus senegalensis) is a species of bird in the family Malaconotidae. It is found in Nigeria and Central Africa. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. References
nodes.shortSummary: The red-eyed puffback (Dryoscopus senegalensis) is a species of bird in the family Malaconotidae. It is found in Nigeria and Central Africa.

nodes.name: LC
